name: @worklist/crypto-web
description: Auditable browser encryption implementation for Worklist.

scripts.test: bun run ensure:node26 && node "$(cd ../.. && bun pm bin)/vitest" run
scripts.ensure:node26: node -e "const major = Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major !== 26) { console.error('Vitest must run under Node 26; found ' + process.version + '. Select Node 26 and retry.'); process.exit(1); }"
